annotation_status: draft — requires validation by domain expert before production use

key_test_cases.jtbd09-001: Score below 85 threshold but qualitatively breaking — LLM must override score
key_test_cases.jtbd09-007: Score above 85 threshold but NOT breaking — tests blind score-following vs. qualitative judgment
key_test_cases.jtbd09-024: Borderline score=85, should be breaking based on event type

notes: Precision is weighted more heavily than recall in this task — false alerts cause alarm fatigue.
The alert_type taxonomy for golden set: major_product_launch, m_and_a_or_investment, legal_regulatory, market_structural_shift.
All 25 cases are based on real article titles and leads from the project's dedupe.json and weekly digest.
